entry.title: Re: Different Budgets - just one should be visible
entry.content:
Hi @lindaweiler8 

It's doable but budgets visibility is controlled by visibility on the "Spent" column defined in the budget design.

For example :

  • Budget 1 spent is based on Merit column
  • Budget 2 spent is based on Adjustment column

Managers of group 1 can see both Merit and Adjustment column so they can see both budgets

Managers of group 2 can only see Adjustment so Budget 1 is automatically hidden from them.

You can "trick" the system by redirecting the value from one of the standard recommendation columns into a custom one and have your budget based on that. 

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Date Stamp on Custom Variable Pay statement
entry.content:
Hi @rkumar1947 

I just ran your question by a custom statement expert and he confirmed it is not possible, it would require java which is not supported.

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: SAP Principal Propagation without Secrets: How Managed Identity in APIM Simplifies Everything
entry.content:
but how you get from azure apim to sap oauth server which is on prem? You still have to open your network or use SCC which already have princip. propagation.

I guess, that I'm missing something.

entry.title: Re: inspection plan is not getting deleted using app Dele...
entry.content: The app Delete Inspection Plans  ( QSR6 )  is available in S/4HANA Cloud as well for deleting inspection plans without archiving them.

entry.title: Re: Understanding Fragments based Adobe form building using LiveCycle version 10+ with OData as back
entry.content:
Hi @Sijin_Chandran 
You are definitely making a long-lasting impression with this blog.
Help me with one thing, which I'm recently trying for my knowledge purpose.

Client Logo is so far uploaded in MANAGE LOGO Fiori app, and then the name of the same would be handled in SPRO configuration against MASTER FORM with header, footer - by creating a RULE

But if we want to use that same logo in STANDALONE form, what set of code can we write?

I don't want to use SE78 BMP image, string, etc. I am aware of that part.
So, can you help me here?

entry.title: Eclipse ADT crashes by splash screen on Mac due to eclipse.ini "--module-path..."
entry.content:
I was able to use Eclipse ADT 2022-12 for SAP GUI Java on macOS without issues four days ago. I updated it with 2025-03 but also I got still old version and both of them giving me same error. 

It crashes after splash screen and I can't reach even the eclipse interface.

In the eclipse.ini file inside the application contents, I have previously added long time ago the following lines to enable SAP GUI integration within Eclipse ( SAP notes 2971147 )

--module-path=/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/javafx-sdk-21/lib
--add-exports=javafx.web/com.sun.webkit.dom=ALL-UNNAMED

 Now, I explored something about this issue;

If I remove the first line(--module-path..) from eclipse.ini file, Eclipse starts and works basically. But this time, SAP GUI java can not run on application.

entry.title: WHY IS MY BOOK PAGE TEXT CHANGING WHEN THE BOOK IS EXPORTED AND IMPORTED INTO ANOTHER WORK AREA?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have an Enable Now work area where my team creates our learning objects (i. e., books, book pages, simulations, etc.), but we have to publish from a different work area. We are finding that if the font or size of a font is changed on a book page, when the book/book page is imported to the other work area, it is being overwritten by text style defaults set in the other work area. Does this mean that unless a specific text style is created for every size, color, font, that anytime someone makes a manual change to the formatting on a book page it is going to be randomly overwritten? That seems to be what is happening now, and it seems ridiculous that changing the size of the font on a page should be overwritten. Is there a setting that can be turned on/off to avoid having the text style defaults automatically overwrite formatting changes? Any guidance will be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Table Reading in SAP ABAP & Pricing Integration
entry.content:
Hello,

Looking at your code, I have some doubts.
lr = local range
lt = local table
Why use lr_fieldcat TYPE TABLE ... and not lt_fieldcat

Why call "DDIF_FIELDINFO_GET" multiple times instead of caching?

DDIF_FIELDINFO_GET returns data in dfies format, so why define the lr_fieldcat as dd03p which is data dictionary table that stores field definitions.

Is it possible to use DELETE inside the LOOP? "DELETE <fs_result> INDEX sy-tabix." Modifying a table during iteration changes its indexes

Sorry for my doubts, I'm still learning

Best regards,
Daniel Alves Costa

entry.title: How to consume a logo(uploaded in MANAGE LOGO app) in STANDALONE Adobe form (w/o Master template)?
entry.content:
Help me with one thing, which I'm recently trying for my knowledge purpose.

Client Logo is so far uploaded in MANAGE LOGO Fiori app, and then the name of the same would be handled in SPRO configuration against MASTER FORM with header, footer- by creating a RULE

But if we want to use that same logo in STANDALONE form, what set of code can we write?

I don't want to use SE78 BMP image, string, etc. I am aware of that part.
So, can you help me here?

Hopefully this helps you proceed.

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: SAP Customer Checkout with SAP Business One Sizzing Guide for Integration Framework
entry.content:
Hello comunity. 

I am searching for a sizzing guide about the resources that the SAP Integration Framework needs to have for a good performance with an integration between SAP Business One and SAP Customer Checkout.

I have found information about how to improve performance, but not exactlly a sizzing guide. I would like to know what would be the needed resources for an specific amount of points of sales and the number of transactions per POS.

I found this sizzing guide but I only see information about SAP CCO Manager, and not Integration Framework

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CUSTOMER_CHECKOUT/b3ef5bb1234b4776bc5f19afbc601405/b3de0a0ba5e849c39af0f392beea6198.html?locale=en-US

Thanks in advance, hope someone can give me some advice. Thanks

entry.title: Re: inspection plan is not getting deleted using app Delete Task Lists without Archiving ( CA98 )
entry.content: I'm facing the same issue. The inspection plans were uploaded incorrectly for several materials and now need to be deleted in bulk. I tried using the app 'Delete Task Lists without Archiving (CA98)', but when I select the material, I get the message: 'No task lists corresponding to selection criteria exist' Why is this error appearing, even though the task lists clearly exist for the materials?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM - How best to collect Testing Evidence?
entry.content:
Hi, brad_saxon,
I was reviewing unanswered questions to see if I can offer some info that might help.

There is a Blog for end-to-end processing in Testing in Cloud ALM at https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/end-to-end-testing-with-sap-cloud-alm-overview/ba-p/13940483.

There is mention of testing evidence on the Roadmap.

You can use the Comments to capture details of the testing results.

Best regards,

Paula

entry.title: Understanding Cloud Credits and API Call Charges in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We are in the process of implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud along with SAP BTP (including Integration Suite and Cloud ALM). Recently, we were surprised by API call charges between Cloud ALM and Jira (a non-SAP system).

To avoid further unexpected costs and better plan our architecture, we’re trying to understand:

  •  How do SAP cloud credits work in real-world projects?
    When are they activated (start/end), what services do they typically cover, and how should we plan for usage across Integration Suite, Cloud ALM, etc.?
  •  How are API calls charged when integrating SAP Public Cloud with non-SAP systems, such as an external Order Entry System or PIM (Product Information Management)?

Any references, documentation, or guidance based on your experiences would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance,

Prayash

entry.title: Training alert! Check out these 2 New SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 Courses
entry.content:
Discover our newly updated courses focused on the SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 solution.

These courses cater to both business users and administrators, providing you with the essential tools to master this comprehensive platform. Through practical exercises and informative quizzes, you'll gain valuable insights and sharpen your skills. Whether you're looking to understand the basics or delve into advanced administrative functions, these courses are designed to guide you every step of the way.

By the end of your training, you'll be well-prepared to attempt the 'SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 - Implementation Consultant Certification' 

 

Exploring SAP Sales Cloud Version 2

In this course you will learn about SAP Sales Cloud version 2 from a business user’s perspective. Learn how the solution is used by a sales representative as well as a sales manager in their daily tasks

Here are the topics we have covered:

  • Introducing the solution and learning the basics of navigating it
  • Understanding features like guided selling, task management, visit management and more from a Sales Representative's perspective
  • Understanding features like KPI evaluation, forecasting, pipeline management and more from a Sales Managers perspective
  • Exploring Machine learning and Gen AI features like CX AI Toolkit.
  • Understanding features of MS teams integration and relationship Intelligence features
  • Exploring the features of the Mobile Application

 

Configuring SAP Sales Cloud Version 2

In this comprehensive course, you will delve deep into the configurations in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2. Whether you are a new administrator, a functional consultant, or someone seeking to learn how to use the solution, this course will serve as your essential guide.  

Here are the topics we have covered:

  • Exploring and Administrator's daily workflow
  • Configuring  Leads, Opportunities, Quotes, Sales Orders ,Visits and more
  • Configuring Sales Workflows and operations
  • Configuring MS trams integration and relationship intelligence
  • Configuring ML and AI features
  • Configuring the mobile application

Embark on this learning journey to expand your capabilities and achieve your certification goals!

entry.title: Re: Advanced Banking Security with SAP Integration Suite: JWS, JWE, and mTLS

entry.title: Re: Understanding Relationship Types in SAP CAP: One-to-One, One-to-Many, and Many-to-Many
entry.content:
Why are we using additional departmentID since we can directly perform the association on department.

using { managed } from '@sap/cds/common';

namespace employee.catalog;

entity Department : managed {
    key id: UUID;
    departmentName: String;
    employees: Association to many Employee on employees.department = $self;
}

entity Employee : managed {
    key id: UUID;
    employeeName: String;
    departmentID: String; <--- Can't we remove this?
    department: Association to Department;
}

entry.title: Re: Object Store on SAP BTP | Setting up instance sharing on Object Store
entry.content:
MTA.yaml code for instance sharing

  - name: name-of-resource
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: objectstore
      service-plan: reference-instance
      config:
        selectors:
          instance_name_selector: "name-of-referring-instance"

entry.title: Apply formula results to hierarchy members
entry.content:
With measure MontantVentes, I wish to apply a calcultation for all account members under parent “Domestique”. I therefore specify the hierarchy property in the If formula condition which evaluates the account dimension:

 

Calculation only computes at parent level.

How can I get the children to calculate as well?

entry.title: Calculated measure not aggregating properly in parent dimension
entry.content:
We all know that SAC doesn’t have the normal behaviour of calculating, then aggregating. It does the opposite, namely aggregating, then calculating. Because of this, I get incorrect sum at parent level for a calculated measure. I thought I could nevertheless reach my goal by using exception agregation, but it’s not working. I also tried to create another meaure which reference this one, but without success.

How can I get the children's total to be accurate in parent Domestique?

entry.title: Logon to access the system
entry.content:
Hi,

What credentials are required to log on to system (SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance) through SAP GUI or Remote Desktop (for client 100). I read the notes and tried all the combinations but its not working. Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP TM - Path finder
entry.content:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e3dc5400c1cc41d1bc0ae0e7fd9aa5a2/af430ceebbb6448dba3087ddb4b01ee2.html?locale=en-USstate=PRODUCTIONversion=2021.001

You can execute this function and check the result in either the transportation network cockpit or on the transportation proposals user interface:

  • Transportation Network Cockpit

    When you open the context menu for a location in the transportation network cockpit, you can choose: Find  Connection To Location... and enter a destination in the dialog box displayed. The system then calculates all of the available connections in the transportation network and displays them on the map. The color of the connections indicates whether a valid transportation lane or schedule exists.

  • Transportation Proposals

    When you call the user interface for transportation proposals, you can choose the appropriate pushbutton to show or hide the available connections on the map. As in the transportation network cockpit, the color of the connections indicates whether a valid transportation lane or schedule exists.

  • Explanation Tool

    When you select one or more freight units, you can choose the Show Network Path pushbutton to analyze the underlying transportation network that is taken into account when planning the selected freight units.

entry.title: Transport Checks for Features in Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Introduction

The Transport Checks are available for Features application in Cloud ALM and you can check a CTS-managed transport set to evaluate the impact on your production tenant.

The checks include Downgrade Protection and a Cross-Reference Check. It’s possible to choose to perform an individual check or both.

 

Downgrade Protection (DGP) tracks objects in transport requests, and reports conflicts when different versions of the same object that is saved in two or more transport requests is imported.

  • Predecessor Check (Sequence Violation)

The system can detect conflicting predecessors, that is, preceding transport requests containing conflicts, at the time of importing transport requests to the production.

  • Imminent Check (Downgrade Situation)

The system can detect impending (imminent) downgrade conflicts when transport requests are imported. This kind of conflict would become an actual downgrade if you ignored the conflict.

Cross-reference Check can detect inconsistencies for objects that are referenced in transport requests, indicating object dependencies.

Objects in transport requests sometimes refer to other objects that are not included in the transport. The cross-reference check applies a where-used-analysis to check the referenced objects in transport requests. If a referenced object doesn’t exist in the target system or if the referenced object in the source system has a different version than in the target system, the check indicates a potential error. In addition, the check shows the last transport requests for the missing object versions.

The cross-reference check can handle the following type of data:

  • ABAP repository data.

  • Dictionary objects

  • Customizing objects

Logical transport objects and SAP HANA objects are not supported.

Both checks identify conflicts with other transport requests by using the RFC connection you created in the production system that targets your development system. As a result, this checks all transports that are in the production system import buffer. This means that unassigned transports or transports assigned to another feature can also be conflicting entities.

Preparation

  • You can only perform checks for ABAP systems with CTC = 1 configuration

  • You've installed at least ST-PI 740 SP 27 and implemented the latest versions of SAP Notes 3497169 and 3497168

  • You've set up your RFC connection. For more information, see SAP Note 3447901

  •  You created the role SAP_SDF_ALM_TRCHK for your RFC user as described in SAP Note 2475591

  • Your source tenant and target tenant reside on different physical systems.

  • In the production tenant for client 000, you've activated use case task Transports: Check. For more information, see Activating the Use Case Transports.

  • At least one CTS-managed transport is assigned to your feature.

  • Your transports are in the import queue of your production tenant, or are already deployed to production.


Use

You can choose to perform an individual check or both. When you perform transport checks, all production tenants of all CTS-managed transports of your feature are checked.

You can start transport checks in the detail view of your feature in the Features app.

After a check has been successful and shows a warning or error, you can select a check to navigate to the Transport Checks app. The Transport Checks app provides more details about the checks and shows you what to do in case of critical results.

Check Statuses

Transport Checks can have the following statuses:

  • Scheduled: Transport check has been scheduled. Note that you can't perform a check again as long as it's in status Scheduled.

  • Completed: If your check passed, you can continue with deploying your feature. If your result shows a warning, you can select the check to navigate to the Transport Checks app to get more details.

  • Failed: If a check fails, follow the solution provided in the popover.

  • Canceled: If a transport check job hasn't been picked up by the managed system within 8 hours, the transport check is canceled. In this case, perform the check again.

Notifications

You only receive an email notification for a completed transport check if you performed the check.

For more information about enabling notifications, see Working With In-App Notifications and Enabling Email Channel for In-App Notifications.

entry.title: SuccessFactors Insurance Rate Chart
entry.content:
Hi ,

  We are configuring Medical Insurance by auto enrolment and have query on Auto Enrollment and Rate Chart. We have a requirement to Auto Enrol Employee and Dependants to Medical Insurance, where for Employee there are no premium contribution and for Dependants the premium is based on different age criteria and also premium changes based on location.

So my question is do we have to create different coverage and its premium. For ex: 1 for Employee + Spouse and rate chart should have age criteria and appropriate premium amount for just spouse?

Another coverage saying Emp + Family and for this how should the rate chart be created. How the system would differentiate between Spouse and Children. If we have say 1 spouse and 2 children, will it automatically calculate the premium amount for each dependent based on age criteria and add it during auto enrollment.? Please advise.

Looking forward for your reply.

Thanks

Arunsri B.S

@StephanieBM01

entry.title: Re: TRM - Add Limit Characteristics to assign it to Limit...
entry.content:
Hello @MBilalAhmed ,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the ability to create or assign custom Limit Characteristics, such as Monitoring Unit or Product Type, to a Limit Type is not supported. 

Use of Predefined Characteristics: Only standard, SAP-delivered limit characteristics are available.

Click on the SAP help source below

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/e5ec5859d8e54df98492d80564a734c0/560ada531198434de10000000a174cb4.html

Let me know if you need further support

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: 1658218007899 is your 91 CĿUB 𝘐nviTe Code
entry.content: 1658218007899 is your 91 CĿUB 𝘐nviTe Code. Use this code at the very start of your journey i.e at 𝓢ignup and claim an amazing bonus of ₹900 directly in your account. Enjoy your journey on this platform and claim many bonuses!

entry.title: Re: Event Based Revenue Recognition - deferred revenue po...
entry.content:
Hello @MartinDejl 

Your business scenario involves combined billing for physical goods (stock items) and prepaid services (non-stock items), with revenue recognition timing differences. Here's a structured approach to address your case in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition:

  1. Sales Order Configuration
  • Use Sales Order with mixed item categories:
    • TAN: Standard item category for physical goods – revenue recognized upon billing.
    • TAD (or custom Z* service category): For prepaid services – set to defer revenue at billing and trigger recognition later.
  1. Revenue Recognition Logic
  • Use Event-Based Revenue Recognition (EBRR)
    • TAN items use a billing-based event, → revenue is posted upon invoice.
    • TAD items use a deferred revenue account at billing, then manual/posting-triggered fulfilment to recognise revenue.
  1. Tracking Prepaid Usage and Expiry
  • Implement Provider Contracts via Subscription Billing Integration or Sales Contract with custom fields for:
    • Number of uses (e.g., 10-pack)
    • Expiration date logic (can be managed via custom business object in Key User Extensibility)
  1. Revenue Contract Setup
  • In Universal Journal, the billing triggers revenue contract creation for TAD items.
  • Revenue is held until the event (service rendered) is received from the external system → trigger revenue recognition via Journal Entry

Let me know if you need further information

With regard

Chuma

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now questions
entry.content:
It is harder to find information on it but there is also the SAP Companion. This is free!.

This allows for context sensitive help in SAP but only with the standard content, i.e no customisation.

Accessing and Using Standard SAP Content - SAP Community

This post provides some additional guidance.

Cheers

Brad

entry.title: SAPUI5 how to filter at column level
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to develop an fiori application for SAP S/4 HANA using BTP Business application studio.

Product and Product Description has 1:n relation.

I have two columns in one table and I would like to display both Product ID and Description (filtered language eq English) in one table.

I think I have to use the filter. But how can I apply the filter only to one column? I want to use the filter something like this.  {path:'to_Description',parameters:{select:'Description'}, filters: [{path: 'Language', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'EN'}]}

Below is how my table is which is not displaying description. My goal is to displaying description.

 

<Table id="table" width="auto" items="{path: '/Material', parameters: {expand: 'to_Description'} }" noDataText="{worklistView>/tableNoDataText}" busyIndicatorDelay="{worklistView>/tableBusyDelay}" growing="true" growingScrollToLoad="true" updateFinished=".onUpdateFinished">

                <columns>
                    <Column id="materialColumn">
                        <Text text="Product ID" id="materialColumnTitle"/>
                    </Column>
                    <Column id="descriptionColumn">
                        <Text text="Description" id="descriptionColumnTitle"/>
                    </Column>
                </columns>

                <items>
                    <ColumnListItem type="Navigation" press=".onPress" id="test3">
                        <cells>
                            <Text text="{Material}"/>
                            <Text text="{to_Description/ProductDescription}" id="test2"/>
                        </cells>
                    </ColumnListItem>
                             
                </items>
            </Table>

entry.title: Re: Learning Path for SAP Cloud ALM

entry.title: FEH (Forward Error Handling) & ECH (Error Conflict Handler) - is there a way to bypass?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

In my scenario - I wish to send the asynchronous error / fault message back to the caller (Non SAP system) instead of handling within SAP itself. I already have gone through a few blog posts on the same - one of them https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/feh-forward-error-handling-ech-error-conflict-handler/ba-p/13424519

The is indeed have extensive information about how to make FEH enabled and get this handled via ECH. But If I want to bypass this setup rather would like to send back to the caller system, is this at all possible? 

Any idea will be much helpful. 

My asynchronous SOAP service is BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In. I wish to send this via - BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateConfirmation_Out. 

Thanks in advance!

- Regards, Somnath

entry.title: sap b1 servicelayer reachable from the internet - security
entry.content:
Hello,

do you know about sap b1 servicelayer security?
In case the service layer would be reachable from the internet?

We are using an external spend management cloudtool. (hosted by google and aws)
It exports the spend values to this servicelayer adress:

https://public-static-ip-of-the-local-sap-b1server:xxxxx/b1s/v2/Login/

Do you know about possibilities to improve security?
Maybe allowing source traffic only from AWS or Google Cloud is insecure.

Regards,
Hareesh

entry.title: Re: could not find Entity for Unit of Measure grp(MEGRP)...
entry.content:
Would that be MARC-MEGRU and MVKE-MEGRU?

They are in the entities MARCMRPLS and MVKESALES, respectively.

For more info on model mapping, check transaction MDGM_MODEL_DETAILS

entry.title: Re: Bill of exchange payment request print out in France...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

In France (but also the case for Spain and Italy), it's common practice to send a bill of exchange (BoE) request to the customer for signature before the actual payment or bank presentation. In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, while the process to create a noted item using a special G/L indicator (R) works correctly after the payment run, there's no standard functionality to print the BoE request for customer signature.

 

The output setting in "Output Parameter Determination" only covers the BoE presentation to the bank, not the initial document that the seller prepares and sends to the customer for acceptance.

So, to your questions:

Is there a standard template to print the BoE request?
No, unfortunately not in the Public Cloud version.

 

Is it possible to print such a document?
Yes, but it would require a custom solution. You’d need to build your own form (via Adobe Forms) and trigger it based on data from noted items, either through a custom app or report.

 

What application object should be used?
There isn’t a dedicated one for BoE requests. The existing object is only for bank submission. You’d have to create a custom object or view to fetch the data and attach a print form to that.

 

What you can do :

If printing the BoE request is a must for your process, you could:

  1. Create a custom report showing the BoE noted items.
  2. Link it to a custom Adobe Form that mimics the BoE layout.
  3. Let users print or download the document directly from that report.

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Error in posting Gl entry
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

Could you please tell me on which technoogy's version you're working on and the screenshot of the error's message reference ?

Thank you in advance for your reply.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Bill of exchange payment request print out in France...
entry.content:
Dear Jeremy,

great thanks for your help

entry.title: Re: Error in establishing IDoc connection between SAP CPI...
entry.content:
Symptom

Inbound ORDERS05 IDoc sent from SAP CPI to S/4HANA over /sap/bc/srt/idoc fails with

CX_SOAP_APPLICATION – Unknown error occurred in the IDoc inbound processing

The same text appears both in CPI Monitoring and SRT_ELOG / Error Context inside S/4.

Root cause

Every IDoc segment tag in XML must carry the flag SEGMENT="1".

Only the top‐level control record in your payload has it; all child segments (E1EDK01, E1EDK14 …) are missing the attribute.

The XML→IDoc converter therefore raises an internal exception and the Web‑Service layer returns a generic HTTP 500 SOAP fault.

Fix (pick one of the two)

1. Let CPI do the dirty work

    • In your IDoc Receiver adapter, tick Apply Converter ▸ Convert to IDoc XML.

    • Pass the IDoc to CPI in flat format (control record line + data lines).

    • The adapter automatically adds SEGMENT="1" to every segment and applies the right namespace.

‑ OR ‑

    • Open your sample XML and add SEGMENT="1" to every segment tag, e.g.

      Quick manual patch

       

       

<E1EDK01 SEGMENT="1"> … </E1EDK01>
<E1EDK14 SEGMENT="1"> … </E1EDK14>

 

  • Re‑send the file.

After either fix, the IDoc should be created in S/4 (check WE02) – it may land in status 64 or 56 if partner‑profile settings are still incomplete.

Extra sanity checks (do these if you hit the next wall)

CheckTransaction / Place

SNDPOR CPIDEV defined as logical system

BD54

Inbound partner KU/C000003 with message type ORDERS & process code ORDE

WE20

CPI technical user has S_IDOC and S_ICF auth objects

SU01 / PFCG

No short dump EDI_XML_IDOC‑SEGMENT_MISSING_FLAG

ST22

entry.title: Re: Error in posting Gl entry

entry.title: Re: FI-AA: Asset below-zero value
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

You're getting the error AA548 when trying to run depreciation in AFAB. That usually means SAP is trying to post accounting entries for depreciation but something is missing or misconfigured in the background specifically, in the setup of how asset accounting connects to the general ledger.

The message says there's a problem with the line item schema SAP_500_724. That schema controls what accounting entries are created during depreciation. If something is missing, like a GL account, the system can't generate the journal entries and throws this error.

Here's what you can check:

1. Account Determination (AO90)
Go to transaction AO90 and check if the right GL accounts are assigned for your asset class and depreciation areas. Make sure there are accounts for:

    • Asset acquisition
    • Depreciation expense
    • Accumulated depreciation

 

2. Asset Master Data (AS03)
Look at the asset you're depreciating. Make sure:

    • It has the right asset class
    • The depreciation area is active and correctly set up
    • It uses a valid depreciation key

 

3. Run AFAB in test mode
Try running the depreciation with test run + detailed log. SAP will usually show you which asset or account is causing the problem.

 

4. S/4HANA-specific
If you're on S/4HANA, make sure your depreciation expense accounts are also set up as secondary cost elements, since they now post to both FI and CO.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: How to change GL account after Supplier invoice is po...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

Once a supplier invoice is posted, you can’t just go in and change the G/L account—it’s locked in. But there are a few ways to fix it depending on your situation:

1. Reverse and Repost (cleanest way)

If the invoice hasn’t been paid yet, the best option is to reverse it and post it again with the correct G/L account.

  • Use the “Manage Supplier Invoices” app or transaction FB08 (if you have access to the GUI).
  • Once reversed, create a new invoice with the correct account.

 

2. Post a Manual Journal Entry

If the invoice is already paid or you don’t want to reverse it, you can post a manual journal entry to move the amount from the wrong G/L to the right one.

  • Go to “Post General Journal Entries”
  • Debit the incorrect account and credit the correct one (or vice versa, depending on what happened).

This way, your financials are corrected, even if the original invoice stays as-is.

 

3. Use a Credit Memo and Repost

If you want to keep everything vendor-related clean:

  • Post a credit memo to cancel out the original invoice.
  • Then post a new invoice with the correct G/L account.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Why the expiry date of SF "Certified Professional" in...
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the same issue as well that my Professional certifications show as "Expired" in Credly. They are not visible in "https://learning.sap.com/my-learning/certifications" as well. One of my colleague had reached out to SAP and their reply was that the SF Professional qualification will be valid until the Associate certification is active. The SAP Development Team is working on a solution to bring the professional level qualification as well on SAP Learning (LCS) and the professional certification validity will be extended before the expiration date. There is no solution to this yet. In addition, almost everyone with Professional certification/s I know is facing this issue.

entry.title: Re: Eclipse ADT crashes by splash screen on Mac due to eclipse.ini "--module-path..."

entry.title: Re: Eclipse ADT crashes by splash screen on Mac due to eclipse.ini "--module-path..."
entry.content: The note 2971147 asks to check the current Java version, but you say you "added long time ago". So, what is your CURRENT Java version?

entry.title: No of container not reflecting in recurring inspection
entry.content:
While doing GRN against  purchase order there is option to enter No of containers (ANZGEB) under quantity tab and also while creating manual inspection lot for 09 inspection type under origin tab we again have a field to enter No of containers but when inspection lot is created through job through QA07 and also it is scheduled in background we don't have option to enter no of containers. 

 

Business requirement is what ever value is entered for No of containers for the Batch at the time of 101 goods receipt against purchase order that value should come automatically for No of containers (ANZGEB) against each batch while creating inspection lot through QA07.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework
entry.content: Thank you @Rene_de_Daniel !

entry.title: CAP bookshop sample, fixing the translation editor for localizations
entry.content:
When using CAP with NodeJS runtime, you may have been in contact with the "bookshop sample" over the years. This is also generated as complete sample application in your project folder, when you run

cds add sample

on the command line.

You may have noticed, that in the UI on the object (detail) page for a book, in the "Translations" section it is currently not possible to add another localization line with a locale, title and description for further languages. There is no data available as value help and whatever you enter as locale in the draft is not accepted:

If you leave it empty, you can save the draft, but then you have no locale for your new entry and also this can not be edited afterwards:

To be honest, I was a bit surprised, that this sample, which SAP uses in many tutorials / learning courses and included in the CDS tooling to be generated as sample, shows such a basic deficiency.

The reasons seems to be, that this sample was developed earlier for OData V2 and not migrated cleanly over time to OData V4. The main problem in the file ‎app/admin-books/fiori-service.cds is the following line, which is not valid anymore in OData V4:

locale @(ValueList.entity: 'Languages', Common.ValueListWithFixedValues)

The fixes seem to be relatively simple. In the file ‎app/admin-books/fiori-service.cds you add in the header:

using {sap} from '@sap/cds/common';
using from '@sap/cds-common-content';

The locale annotation block has to be replaced.
Old:

// Add Value Help for Locales
annotate AdminService.Books.texts {
  locale @(rvice.c
    ValueList.entity: 'Languages',
    Common.ValueListWithFixedValues, //show as drop down, not a dialog
  )
};o OData

New: ValueL

// Add Value Help for Locales
annotate AdminService.Books.texts with {
  locale @(
    Common.FieldControl : #Mandatory,
    Common.ValueListWithFixedValues,
    Common.ValueList : {
      $Type         : 'Common.ValueListType',
      CollectionPath: 'Languages',
      Parameters    : [
        { $Type            : 'Common.ValueListParameterInOut',
          LocalDataProperty: locale,
          ValueListProperty: 'code' },
        { $Type            : 'Common.ValueListParameterDisplayOnly',
          ValueListProperty: 'descr' }
      ]
    }
  );
};

In package.json in the dependencies, you will have to add "@sap/cds-common-content": "^2.1.0", like:

"dependencies": {
  "@sap/cds": "^8",
  "@sap/cds-common-content": "^2.1.0",
  "express": "^4"
},

This can be done on the command line with:

npm add @sap/cds-common-content --save

This will show all language / country codes currently defined in the cds-common package as value help for the locale field:

If you select 'es' and add some text, after saving the draft, you will see:

If you do not want to see all predefined languages / country codes and want to override it with a selection of your choice, you can add a table as CSV in the db/data folder under the name db/data/sap.common-Languages.csv for example with this content:

code;descr
de;Deutsch
en;English
fr;Français
es;Español
it;Italiano

Hoping this helps - and hoping SAP will fix their sample code generated by the cds tool as well.
(Sorry for some strange characters and formattings in this post, but it could not be fixed using the buggy WYSIWYG editor)

entry.title: Re: Duplicate run of integration flow consuming event from event mesh

entry.title: SAP Continous Integration & Delivery - Branch with pattern not working
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We have a job in our SAP CI/CD instance which is supposed to be triggered on all the branches starting by feature. For this, we have followed the nomenclature feature*. Configuration screenshot as follows:

Unfortunately, when developers are pushing code to their respective feature branches the job is not triggered.

Based on this video tutorial, this should be possible but it is not working for us.

https://www.sap.com/assetdetail/2023/11/fa4748fb-967e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Any idea what we may be missing?

Thanks,

C.

entry.title: Re: SAP Continous Integration & Delivery - Branch with pa...
entry.content:
Sorted. Our feature branches are named with slashes.

Based on the documentation we need to use ** if we want to include slashes.

https://help.sap.com/docs/continuous-integration-and-delivery/sap-continuous-integration-and-delivery/configure-multi-branch-job?language=en-US&q=branch

Changing the branch name to feature** solved our issue.

Thanks,

C.

entry.content:

entry.title: Re: restful get scheduled report status and error message
entry.content: SDK version appears to have a problem setting the expiry date on the instance but API version appears to work okay # SDK # POST http://$hostport/biprws/infostore/$reportid/scheduleForms/now # API # POST http://$hostport/biprws/v1/infostore/$reportid/schedules/schedule/now

entry.title: Get value using XPATH is generating An internal error occurred.
entry.content:
Dear experts.

I have a doubt.

I am creating a iflow simple and I want get information in a variable in the header message 

An internal error occurred.

For error details check MPL ID AGgWasorb6sWe1EW6sIDdbbq5ypk in message monitoring or use the URL https://0471e9eftrial.integrationsuite-trial.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com:443/shell/monitoring/MessageDetails/%7B%22messageGuid%22%3A%22AGgWasorb6sWe1EW6sIDdbbq5ypk%22%7D to directly access the error information.

<universidad xmlns:alum="http://example.com/alumnos" xmlns:curso="http://example.com/cursos">
	<alum:estudiantes>
		<alum:estudiante id="E001" becado="sí">
			<alum:nombre>María García</alum:nombre>
			<alum:edad>22</alum:edad>
			<alum:cursos>
				<curso:curso codigo="CS101">Programación I</curso:curso>
				<curso:curso codigo="MA101">Álgebra</curso:curso>
			</alum:cursos>
		</alum:estudiante>
		<alum:estudiante id="E002">
			<alum:nombre>José López</alum:nombre>
			<alum:edad>24</alum:edad>
			<alum:cursos>
				<curso:curso codigo="CS101">Programación I</curso:curso>
				<curso:curso codigo="FI101">Física</curso:curso>
			</alum:cursos>
		</alum:estudiantes>
	</universidad>

//alum:estudiante[@id='E001']/alum:edad

This work fine In the page https://www.freeformatter.com/xpath-tester.html#before-output

What is the cause of this error?

 

 

Regards

entry.title: What is the 91 𝑪𝑙𝒖𝒃 Invi𝒕𝚎 Code? 1627417228387 (USE TO EARN REWARDS)
entry.content:
The code 1627417228387 is your personal 91 𝑪𝑙𝒖𝒃 Invi𝒕𝚎 Code. Use this code during the signup process on the 91 𝑪𝑙𝒖𝒃 app to instantly receive a welcome bon𝒖s.

To apply it, simply open the app, go to the signup section, find the “Invi𝒕𝚎 Code” field, and enter the code. It’s a straightforward way to earn a bonus or unlock special rewards just by joining.

Have your own code? Share it with friends so you can all enjoy additional bon𝒖ses together!

91 𝑪𝑙𝒖𝒃 Invi𝒕𝚎 Code 2025

 

App Name

91 𝑪𝑙𝒖𝒃

91 𝑪𝑙𝒖𝒃 Invi𝒕𝚎 Code

1627417228387

Signup bon𝒖s

Rs 1000

91 𝑪𝑙𝒖𝒃 Invi𝒕ation Code

1627417228387

91 𝑪𝑙𝒖𝒃 Gift Code

1627417228387

91 𝑪𝑙𝒖𝒃 Invi𝒕ation Code Details

Use 1627417228387 as your 91 𝑪𝑙𝒖𝒃 Invi𝒕ation Code during account creation. Once entered, you’ll get an instant bon𝒖s of ₹250, which can be used to play games and start earning real money on the app.

This code provides new users with access to exclusive benefits and promotional rewards. Just look for the “Invi𝒕ation Code” section when signing up, input the code, and you’re all set.

About 91 𝑪𝑙𝒖𝒃

91 𝑪𝑙𝒖𝒃 is your go-to app for exciting deals, offers, and reward programs. Whether you're into shopping, dining, or entertainment, this platform helps you save while enjoying top-quality services.

With every transaction, you can earn points, unlock discounts, or receive bonuses. It’s ideal for anyone who wants to make the most of their spending and enjoy added value with ease.
